root.rep_text: กระดาษทำการสินทรัพย์ถาวรและค่าเสื่อมราคา ตามวันที่คำนวณ (เพิ่มเติม จาก 5.)
root.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.meterial_id, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.seq_no, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.total_amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.present_value, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.cal_expire_date, sc_acc_m_expire.rate_expire, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.operate_date, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.item_type, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.acc_exp, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.day_cal, sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day, sc_acc_m_expire.balance, sc_acc_m_expire.remark, sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp.group_name, sc_acc_m_expire.group_exp, sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status, (case sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status when 1 then 'ตัดเป็นค่าใช้จ่าย'||' '||to_tdate(sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') when 2 then 'ขายทอดตลาด'||' '||to_tdate(sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') when 3 then 'ชำรุด'||' '||to_tdate(sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') when 4 then 'บริจาค'||' '||to_tdate(sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') when 5 then 'เทิร์น'||' '||to_tdate(sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') end) as paid_status , sc_acc_m_expire.accu_expire_amount, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.begin_exp, sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date , substr(to_char(sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date,'DD/MM/YYYY'),1,6)as sub_day, substr(to_char(sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date,'DD/MM/YYYY'),7,5)::int + 543 as sub_year, sc_acc_m_expire.special_balance, '!operate_date_2!' as adtm_enddate FROM sc_acc_m_expire, sc_acc_m_expire_detail, sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp WHERE ( sc_acc_m_expire.material_id = sc_acc_m_expire_detail.meterial_id) and ( sc_acc_m_expire.group_exp = sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp.group_exp ) /* and ( ( sc_acc_m_expire_detail.cal_expire_date between :adtm_begindate and :adtm_enddate )*/ /*and ( sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day = (select sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account from sc_acc_m_account_year where sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = year(:adtm_enddate)) )*/ /*and (sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date >= :adtm_begindate OR sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date is null) */ and sc_acc_m_expire.material_id not in ('4800374','4800375','4800689','4800376','4800529') and sc_acc_m_expire_detail.seq_no = (select max(a.seq_no) from sc_acc_m_expire_detail a where a.meterial_id = sc_acc_m_expire_detail.meterial_id) and sc_acc_m_expire_detail.operate_date >= to_date('23/11/2017','DD/MM/YYYY') /*WHERE*/ and sc_acc_m_expire_detail.operate_date between '!operate_date_1!' and '!operate_date_2!' order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old
